title: cirsium × kornhuberi
intro: Cirsium × kornhuberi, also known as the Kornhuber's thistle or the hybrid thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is a hybrid of the Cirsium pannonicum and Cirsium heterophyllum species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with medicinal compounds such as saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids being isolated from its flowers and leaves. The health benefits of Cirsium × kornhuberi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Cirsium × kornhuberi include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function, reduce fever, and promote wound healing.
